reasoning: XLK (tech) down -1.18% is the dominant sector signal — a clear risk-off move. Tech is ~30% of SPY weighting, so this weakness directly headwinds broad strength. XLE (energy) flat at +0.25%, XLF (financials) flat at -0.2% — no offsetting leadership. Yesterday's SPY -0.51% move correlates with tech leadership down. While premarket shows overnight recovery (+$0.87 gap up, BULL ribbon), sector internals yesterday suggest caution — tech weakness persists as a headwind until the sector stabilizes.
key_observations: XLK: -1.18% (significant tech weakness, largest SPY component)
XLF: -0.2% (financials flat, no conviction either direction)
Rotation: Classic risk-off — growth (XLK) underperforming, energy defending
